Testimonials

Sale

The Quickdraw 2.0 | Crazy Horse Leather Minimalist Wallet
  • $29.95
Color
Brown
Denim Blue
Black Pearl
 
 
 This item is a recurring or deferred purchase. By continuing, I agree to the cancellation policy and authorize you to charge my payment method at the prices, frequency and dates listed on this page until my order is fulfilled or I cancel, if permitted.

Our most popular wallet, The Quickdraw, now 40% smaller and reimagined in strong and durable Crazy Horse leather, as well as an ID window that is 5x thicker.

The Quickdraw 2.0 is a minimalist wallet with 5 card slots, an ID window, and an expanding middle section to keep folded cash, business cards, receipts or notes. Whip it out with easy access to all your cards at a glance, no unfolding or fumbling to find the right card.

The Quickdraw 2.0 is 4.25 inches long, 2.75 inches tall, and a quarter of an inch thick.
